prompt: Single-person realistic indoor mobile phone selfie landscape, narrow corner scene, close-up shot from chin to mid-upper thigh, simple background, focus on upper body curves, short skirt sitting posture, leg perspective, and warm lighting. Subject Characteristics: Young female feel, face basically not in frame, only showing a small amount of chin and neck; light blue long curly hair hanging from both sides to the chest. The body is characterized by a slender upper body, fuller chest, significantly tightened waistline, tucked pelvis, fair and straight legs, overall a light cosplay feel, soft but with clear curves. Clothing and Materials: Top is a white long-sleeved shirt with vertical ruffles and small buttons on the chest, smooth and slightly shiny fabric, slightly puffed sleeves; bottom is a gray-black checkered high-waisted short pleated skirt, with a black waistband, thin fabric, skirt naturally flares out and folds after sitting. Bare legs, no shoes/socks info. Action, Camera, Composition Template: Person sitting on gray tile floor, back and left shoulder near the corner, torso leaning forward slightly, right arm extended holding phone for a selfie, left hand naturally holding a doll by the side. Knees forward, legs extended toward the camera, forming a continuous downward-pressing perspective of chest-waist-skirt-thighs. Camera is located slightly higher in the upper right front, shooting downwards, cropping the top of the head and most of the face, making the chest, waistline, skirt, and thighs the main subjects; left white wall and mirror frame, right dark door panel provide a sense of enclosed space, blue doll in the bottom left corner as an auxiliary anchor. Style and Controls: Style: Realistic daily mobile phone selfie, indoor warm yellow ceiling light/side-top light, brighter on the left, darker on the right, overall low contrast, clean and pale skin tone, soft shadows. Key Anchors: Light blue long curly hair hanging in front of chest, white slightly shiny shirt, gray-black checkered short skirt, sitting on floor leaning forward for selfie, obvious chest-waist-leg perspective, left-bright-right-dark warm light. Negative Constraints: Do not show full face, no standing or kneeling posture, no cold white light, no hard flash, do not make legs too long, do not use wide-angle exaggerated distortion, no complex background, do not miss the left doll and the oppressive feeling of the corner.
